---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report a bug to help us improve VR Physics Lab
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Interact with '...'
3. Observe '...'

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots / Video

If applicable, add screenshots or a video clip.

## 🛠️ Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Unity Version | e.g. 2022.3.x LTS |
| Meta Quest Firmware | e.g. v68.0 |
| OS (if PC testing) | e.g. Windows 11 |
| XR Interaction Toolkit | e.g. 2.5.2 |
| Meta XR SDK | e.g. 65.0 |

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.

## 🔴 Severity

- [ ] Critical (crashes / data loss)
- [ ] High (major feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (feature partially broken)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic issue)
